inline.en-US: O God, the Creator and Redeemer of all them that believe: grant unto the souls of thy servants and handmaids the remission of their sins; that as they have ever desired thy merciful pardon, so by the supplications of their brethren they may receive the same; who livest and reignest with the Father, in the unity of the Holy Spirit, ever one God, world without end. Amen.
